description: Detects erasure when violence against trans people is underreported, misclassified, or ignored.
patterns: Exclusion of trans deaths from national hate crime statistics
examples: Victims reported under birth name rather than lived identity
FBI UCR datasets lacking trans-inclusive fields until 2013
consequence: Masks systemic violence, preventing accountability and protective interventions.
